steps.title: Use the past time marker
steps.content: The phrase Even back in the 1860s places the sentence firmly in the past. The subject nearly 30% of the city's population is treated as singular.

steps.title: Choose past singular tense
steps.content: The verb must be past tense and singular to match the time marker and subject. A and D are present-tense forms, and C is future tense. The simple past singular form completes the sentence. The answer is B.
